author: greqone
name: QScale Int6 + Bigram128 + Stride16
blurb: PR135-derived 9x512 SP-1024 model with qscale-compressed mixed int6 export, MLP hidden size 1376, full bigram hash embedding, no fp16 passthrough, and stride-16 sliding-window evaluation. Best packaged run is a RunPod 8xH100 SXM rerun at 1.16134475 val_bpb. Exact same config was rerun 5 times across Modal H100! and RunPod H100 SXM; pooled one-sided significance vs the required 1.1698 threshold is p=0.00553.
significance_note: This pooled estimate uses one Modal H100! rerun and four RunPod H100 SXM reruns of the exact same config. The RunPod-only subset is still slightly short at p~=0.0116.
